channel.title: Understanding Mars Theme Documentation Update
channel.description:
Hi there, A small thing I noticed on the [Understanding Mars Theme](https://docs.frontity.org/guides/understanding-mars-theme-1) docs: It refers to the Theme component as `theme.js`
![Screen Shot 2021-02-12 at 12.04.13 PM|690x467](upload://jbgPHQf7oAtr2UntzBDhuyhsDAA.png)
I might be mistaken but in my version of Frontity the component name is `Theme` but the file is `mars-theme/src/index.js`
A minor thing but something that added some confusion for me as I've been learning Frontity.
Thanks for the great work!

item.title: Understanding Mars Theme Documentation Update
item.dc:creator: sattley
item.description:
Thanks for jumping on that @mburridge
Yeah I was a little hesitant to call it out since I do believe that the overall example might have been old. Either way thanks and look forward to the review and even better docs!

Read full topic

item.title: Understanding Mars Theme Documentation Update
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Thanks for spotting that @sattley - I’ve fixed it. Though I also notice that the example there doesn’t quite tie in with the current version of mars-theme. We’ll bring that up to date during our forthcoming review of the docs.

Read full topic

item.title: Understanding Mars Theme Documentation Update
item.dc:creator: sattley
item.description:
Hi there,
A small thing I noticed on the Understanding Mars Theme docs:
It refers to the Theme component as theme.js

I might be mistaken but in my version of Frontity the component name is Theme but the file is mars-theme/src/index.js

A minor thing but something that added some confusion for me as I’ve been learning Frontity.

Thanks for the great work!

Read full topic
